name: sms-mail-receiver
description: Hero-SMS automated mail receiver with Telegram alerts, web dashboard, and Render keep-alive

scripts.github:first: git init && git add -A && git commit -m "first commit" && git branch -M main && git remote add origin https://github.com/Ybssss/sms-mail-receiver.git && git push -u origin main
scripts.github:push: git add -A && git commit -m "update" && git push origin main
